description:
You have been contracted to hand-off a tiny, file-based “operator skeleton” that ships three Kubernetes manifests and a quick integrity log.  
Work only inside /home/user; no root privileges are required.

Goal
1. Create a new workspace directory called /home/user/k8s-operator.  
2. Inside that directory create the three manifests listed below **with the exact file-names, indentation, ordering, trailing new-line, and field values as shown**.  
3. Produce a plaintext summary file called /home/user/k8s-operator/manifest_linecount.log that contains one line-count entry for every manifest.  
4. Make a sub-directory /home/user/k8s-operator/staging and copy (do not move) the three manifests into it.

Important formatting rules that the automated tests will check:
• All YAML uses LF line endings only (Unix style) and **must end with exactly one blank newline**.  
• Indent with two spaces per level—never tabs.  
• The three manifest files must have **precisely** the following names and contents:

File: nginx-deployment.yaml  
-------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nginx-deployment
  labels:
    app: nginx
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nginx
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nginx
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nginx
        image: nginx:1.25.4
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
⏎ (a single LF terminator)  
-------------------------------------------------

File: nginx-service.yaml  
-------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nginx-service
  labels:
    app: nginx
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: nginx
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
    protocol: TCP
⏎
-------------------------------------------------

File: kustomization.yaml  
-------------------------------------------------
apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - nginx-deployment.yaml
  - nginx-service.yaml
⏎
-------------------------------------------------

5. Create /home/user/k8s-operator/manifest_linecount.log with the following exact layout (alphabetically-sorted by file-name, **no extra spaces**). Each number is the exact number of non-blank plus blank lines contained in that file, including the final newline:

kustomization.yaml:5
nginx-deployment.yaml:21
nginx-service.yaml:14
⏎ (single trailing LF)

6. Finally, verify the manifests exist in both the main directory and the staging sub-directory.

Hints (do NOT reveal commands directly):
• Standard *mkdir*, *cp*, and shell redirection utilities are sufficient.  
• Use *wc -l* or similar to count lines before composing the .log file.  
• Preserve file ownership and permissions (default 0644 files, 0755 directories) so the test harness can read them.

The task is complete when the automated test finds:
• /home/user/k8s-operator present.  
• The three manifest files containing exactly the YAML above.  
• /home/user/k8s-operator/staging holding byte-for-byte copies of those manifests.  
• /home/user/k8s-operator/manifest_linecount.log matching the specification exactly.
truth:
Expected directory tree after successful completion:
 /home/user/k8s-operator/
 ├── kustomization.yaml
 ├── nginx-deployment.yaml
 ├── nginx-service.yaml
 ├── manifest_linecount.log
 └── staging/
     ├── kustomization.yaml
     ├── nginx-deployment.yaml
     └── nginx-service.yaml

Exact byte contents (note the final LF on every file):

1) /home/user/k8s-operator/nginx-deployment.yaml  
"apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nginx-deployment
  labels:
    app: nginx
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nginx
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nginx
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nginx
        image: nginx:1.25.4
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
"

2) /home/user/k8s-operator/nginx-service.yaml  
"apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nginx-service
  labels:
    app: nginx
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: nginx
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
    protocol: TCP
"

3) /home/user/k8s-operator/kustomization.yaml  
"apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - nginx-deployment.yaml
  - nginx-service.yaml
"

4) /home/user/k8s-operator/manifest_linecount.log  
"kustomization.yaml:5
nginx-deployment.yaml:21
nginx-service.yaml:14
"

All three manifest files must be copied byte-for-byte into /home/user/k8s-operator/staging/.

Permissions assumed by the grader (any stricter is acceptable):  
• Directories: 755  
• Files: 644
